name: forms
description: React Hook Form + zod patterns, form primitives, Select/Checkbox/Switch and wizard example

server-action.notes: Server-action demo uses Prisma directly via lib/prisma.ts. Forms kit installs @prisma/client and prisma; run `npx prisma generate` and `npx prisma migrate dev` in your app. The data kit is optional if you want richer demo models.

wizard.notes: Wizard demo requires the data and auth-core kits (Prisma + NextAuth). Run: npx nextworks add data && npx nextworks add auth-core

scripts: npx prisma generate (optional - only if schema changes)
notes: Forms primitives are UI-only and do not require Prisma or NextAuth. When packaging, consider copying components/ui/form/* and select/checkbox/switch plus example pages if you want demo pages included. Optional server examples are listed under "optionalExamples" and require additional kits.
